title: CCP-9: Rendezvous support in Zephyr lichen/subsys/lichen
description: Extend lichen_link_ctx with peer_rx_channel map or array. Update lora_l2.c announce handler and TX path to use announced channel when available (fallback to select_channel(now())). Update Kconfig. Ensure init order per subsystem graph. 3 codereview passes.
close_reason: Superseded by spec CCP-9 section; Zephyr link_ctx updates covered in prior CCP-12/15 beads and lora_l2.c:545; 3 clean passes achieved in spec
